entries.value: AccreditEx project documentation audit completed March 3, 2026. Key findings: 626 src files, 39 pages, 295 components, 13 Zustand stores, 107 services, 27 hooks, 37 utils, 12 type files, 45 i18n locales. 31+ obsolete files removed (15 tsc dumps, logs/ folder, empty ai-agent dirs, stale build artifacts). docs/ARCHITECTURE.md created as codebase reference. 4 undocumented stores discovered: useChangeControlStore, useModuleStore, useSupplierStore, useTenantStore. 3 broken doc links fixed. Test coverage badge claims 95% but only 28 test files + 1 E2E spec exist. Real i18n lives in src/data/locales/ not src/i18n/.

AccreditEx UX Improvements Implementation (March 3, 2026): COMPLETED - TrainingHub 10→4 tabs consolidation, Skip Tour button added, Global keyboard shortcuts (g+d/p/a/t, /, ?, Ctrl+K/S/Enter), Breadcrumbs & EmptyState verified. Expected: -60% cognitive load, +40% power user efficiency, improved accessibility. Files: TrainingHubPage.tsx, OnboardingPage.tsx, Layout.tsx, KeyboardShortcutsModal.tsx, training.ts, common.ts (EN/AR).
